title: Operate within Community cultures and goals
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate within Community cultures and goals demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify local Community values

pcs.text: Identify and document Community values relevant to program activities for planning of promotional and group activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document Community values relevant to program activities for planning of promotional and group activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document Community values relevant to program activities for planning of promotional and group activities.

pcs.text: Seek permissions and advice from Cultural Authority in accordance with Community protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek permissions and advice from Cultural Authority in accordance with Community protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek permissions and advice from Cultural Authority in accordance with Community protocols.

pcs.text: Work with Cultural Authority to identify Community Elders or Custodians and their roles within the Community relevant to Community consultation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work with Cultural Authority to identify Community Elders or Custodians and their roles within the Community relevant to Community consultation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work with Cultural Authority to identify Community Elders or Custodians and their roles within the Community relevant to Community consultation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify local Community values

elements.title: Research local Community history and plans

pcs.text: Research history of Community relevant to program, and seek permission from Community Elders and Cultural Authorities to use research in promotional, educational and group activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research history of Community relevant to program, and seek permission from Community Elders and Cultural Authorities to use research in promotional, educational and group activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research history of Community relevant to program, and seek permission from Community Elders and Cultural Authorities to use research in promotional, educational and group activities.

pcs.text: Identify relevant documents, symbols, places of value and oral traditions to place program and group in local context
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant documents, symbols, places of value and oral traditions to place program and group in local context?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant documents, symbols, places of value and oral traditions to place program and group in local context.

pcs.text: Identify Community plans and seek permission from Community Elders and Custodians to use plans in promotional, educational and group activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify Community plans and seek permission from Community Elders and Custodians to use plans in promotional, educational and group activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify Community plans and seek permission from Community Elders and Custodians to use plans in promotional, educational and group activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Research local Community history and plans

elements.title: Establish role of program in local Community

pcs.text: Identify current Community social and environmental issues and plans through consultation with Community Elders and Custodians
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify current Community social and environmental issues and plans through consultation with Community Elders and Custodians?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify current Community social and environmental issues and plans through consultation with Community Elders and Custodians.

pcs.text: Identify potential roles of program to Community
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential roles of program to Community?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential roles of program to Community.

pcs.text: Manage interaction with Community to build rapport with individuals and groups
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage interaction with Community to build rapport with individuals and groups?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage interaction with Community to build rapport with individuals and groups.

pcs.text: Establish and maintain consultation processes with Community members and groups in accordance with permissions and Community protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and maintain consultation processes with Community members and groups in accordance with permissions and Community protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and maintain consultation processes with Community members and groups in accordance with permissions and Community protocols.

pcs.text: Maintain image of program in Community by following Community protocols, acknowledging Community concerns and promoting positive image of program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain image of program in Community by following Community protocols, acknowledging Community concerns and promoting positive image of program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain image of program in Community by following Community protocols, acknowledging Community concerns and promoting positive image of program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Establish role of program in local Community

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
